$comment: Per-repo harness config. Copied to .claude/harness-config.json by /harness-init for historical compatibility across engines. The plugin skills (sync/checkpoint/tidy-docs/overnight-report/overnight-seed) read this to learn your doc filenames, gate command, engine, and line budgets. Edit these to match your repo; skills fall back to these same defaults if the file is absent. Optional: add "harness_root": "/abs/path/to/plugin" to pin a specific overnight-harness install (else the Makefile auto-resolves the highest installed version).
